title: Resuscitation Enhancement to Avoid Rearrest Through Evidence-based Strategies in Prehospital Post-resuscitation Care

skipped_criteria: Patients must have received resuscitative care specifically from the Siriraj Emergency Medical Services Center (SiEMS) — no schema field for EMS agency or transport origin.
Patients must have achieved return of spontaneous circulation (ROSC) prior to hospital arrival — no schema field for ROSC status.
Patients must be subsequently transported to the Emergency Department of Siriraj Hospital — no schema field for destination facility.
Exclusion of ROSC patients whose legally authorized representative declined vasopressor administration — no schema field for surrogate consent or treatment refusal.
Exclusion of ROSC patients who had not undergone endotracheal intubation and whose representative declined intubation — no schema field for intubation status or surrogate consent.
Exclusion of ROSC patients without rearrest whose representative declined further investigations after ED arrival — no schema field for rearrest status or surrogate consent.
Exclusion of patients whose legally authorized representative declined study participation — no schema field for consent status.
Exclusion of patients without an available legally authorized representative — no schema field for surrogate availability.
